description_long: This is a mid-sized city bus with a rectangular body, painted primarily in white and blue. The bus features large, dark-tinted rectangular windows along both sides, separated by vertical pillars, providing ample visibility for passengers. The roof is equipped with several raised ventilation units, and the bus rides on six wheels, with the rear wheels set further back. The front of the bus has a wide windshield and a blue bumper, while the rear is similarly styled but with a smaller window. The main passenger entry door is located near the front on the right side, and the bus appears to have a robust metal frame with plastic and glass components.
description: A white and blue city bus with large side windows, roof vents, and a front entry door, designed for urban passenger transport.
description_view_0: Side view showing the left side of the bus with four large windows and no visible entry door.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the back window, blue bumper, and roof vents, with no entry doors visible.
description_view_2: Side view showing the right side of the bus with four large windows and a visible front entry door.
description_view_3: Front view showing the wide windshield, blue bumper, and roof vents, with the entry door not visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: Four large, evenly spaced rectangular windows on each side, separated by vertical pillars, with consistent size and shape throughout.
